aiSummary.plainLanguage: Your blood test shows mostly good results. Blood sugar and red blood cells are healthy. Cholesterol is slightly high — manageable with diet and exercise.
Your chest X-ray looks completely normal. Lungs are clear and heart is a healthy size.
